title: Investigation into Trimac’s use of an audio and video surveillance device in its truck cabins
summary: The complainant, a truck driver employed by Trimac Transportation Services Inc. (“Trimac”), claimed the organization installed a dash camera into his vehicle that continuously recorded audio and video without his consent. The complainant was particularly concerned with the organization’s recording of audio. Our investigation focused on wh...
